selectedImage.licenseName: TMDB-hosted promotional artwork; verify production rights

cropPlan.identityReason: Image shows Josh O'Connor as Marius Pontmercy in tall top hat and 1830s frock coat with cravat and Ellie Bamber as Cosette in blue velvet pelisse with fur collar and black bonnet, the Luxembourg Garden fountain promenade scene that is iconic to the BBC/Masterpiece 2018-2019 TV adaptation of Les Miserables. Costume, hair, and naturalistic cinematography match that exact screen production.
cropPlan.sourceReason: High-resolution photographic still with cinematic depth of field, natural daylight and water spray, production-designed period costumes and location. Not a painting, stage costume, fan art or generic illustration. No overlaid typography or collage.

square.reason: Full-frame 1:1 preserves both figures right of center, leaving bright fountain bokeh in upper-left for date. Eyes at y~200-400 remain well above lower 38% text zone (y>620). Torso dress provides dark clean background for title/quote. No face or hand is intersected by crop edge; negative space balances tension.

medium.reason: 2.128:1 wide band across upper image. Width 1000 height 470 = 2.127 ratio. Top at 12 includes top hat tip, bottom at 482 cuts below Cosette chin but above clasped hands to avoid cutting hands. Faces sit in upper-middle of strip, leaving ~50-120px of dark velvet and coat below for lower-left date, lower-middle title/quote and lower-right rating, preserving eyes outside text.

small.reason: Square widget keeps both faces, eyes, hats and focal interaction fully clear above/beside red zones. Top box sits in negative sky with only minimal edge of top hat behind it. Bottom box covers only lower torsos/hands, allowed. No decapitation, crowding, watermark or embedded text. Attractive and story intact.

medium.reason: Widescreen widget preserves both faces, eyes, hats and period costumes clear of all three red zones. Zones occupy empty background left and lower clothing only. No face/eye or essential action obscured, no decapitation or edge crowding, no watermarks. Composition remains balanced and dramatic.
